items.front: All ATO personnel and anyone using ATO directives.
items.back: Who does FAA Order JO 7110.65 apply to?

items.front: Two websites where this order is available online.
items.back: FAA Air Traffic Plans and Publications website, and FAA Orders and Notices website.

items.front: What publication cycle are order changes synchronized with?

items.back: The schedule to which JO 7110.65 and its changes are published; listed in TBL 1-1-1.
Order available on FAA website 30 days prior to effective date; FAA facility notifies service area distribution officer if not received; military facility notifies headquarters if not received.

items.front: What blocks a coordinated procedural change from being published?
items.back: Operational system software must be adapted first; changes are not made to the order until then (per 1-1-8d).

items.front: Which order covers the detailed submission process for changes to ATC publications?
